description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sideboard cabinet featuring a chevron-patterned wood veneer on the front doors and a smooth, light-colored top and sides. The cabinet stands on a minimalist black metal frame with open rectangular legs, giving it a slightly elevated and airy appearance. The front is divided into four distinct door panels, each with a subtle vertical seam, suggesting separate compartments inside. The wood grain on the doors is arranged in a V-shaped pattern, adding a touch of sophistication and visual interest. The top and sides are finished in a matte, light gray or off-white color, contrasting with the warm wood tones of the doors. No handles are visible, indicating a push-to-open mechanism or integrated edge pulls for a sleek, handleless look.
description: A modern sideboard cabinet with chevron-patterned wood doors, a light matte top and sides, and a black metal base. The design is sleek and handleless, with four front doors and a minimalist frame.
description_view_0: Front view showing four chevron-patterned wood doors and the black metal base.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the smooth, light-colored side panel and the depth of the cabinet.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain, light-colored back panel and the open metal frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the other smooth side panel.
